name: Rust Power User
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y zsh ripgrep fd-find bat git-delta hyperfine valgrind lldb && sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)" "" --unattended && cargo install --locked cargo-binstall && cargo binstall -y --locked cargo-nextest cargo-edit cargo-watch cargo-expand cargo-outdated cargo-audit cargo-udeps cargo-semver-checks cargo-flamegraph cargo-llvm-lines cargo-tarpaulin && rustup component add rustfmt clippy rust-src rust-analyzer && echo '🚀 Rust Power User Environment loaded successfully!' && echo 'export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/cargo/bin' >> ~/.zshrc
